pending_work.description: eng: pin @biomejs/biome@^2.4.12 as devDependency in package.json. Add npm run lint script. IMPLEMENTED in multiple runs. Issue #34 already created as protected-files workaround.
perf: add contain: layout style to .task-card; use ResizeObserver borderBoxSize to avoid forced reflow. Branch kanbanbot/perf-css-contain-20260420. 79 tests pass, lint clean.
test: 2 new tests for buildAgentProgressMap name+description enrichment. Branch kanbanbot/test-agent-progress-enrichment-20260420. 81 tests pass, lint clean.

infrastructure_notes: ROOT CAUSE IDENTIFIED (run 2026-04-20): MCP registry policy check fails with 401 at api.github.com/copilot/mcp_registry. Log: 'MCP server safeoutputs filtered: Could not verify server against any configured registry'. This blocks ALL safeoutputs tools every run. gh CLI also unauthenticated so no git push or PR creation possible. Maintainer action needed: ensure GITHUB_TOKEN in kanbanbot workflow has copilot:read scope or add safeoutputs to allowed MCP servers list. Seen in agent process log: /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/agent/logs/process-*.log
